base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of andore_family — a character from 1989 final fight. Andore Family — heavy-tier grappler bosses (Andore/G. Andore/F. Andore/U. Andore). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Andore Family — heavy-tier grappler bosses (Andore/G. Andore/F. Andore/U. Andore); based on André the Giant
